chat_dock_empty_hint: Start a chat from the Friends page, then it'll show up here as a tab.
chat_input_placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat_live_unavailable: Live updates unavailable — new messages won't appear until you retry.
chat_offline_warning: {name} appears to be offline. Messages will be delivered when they come online.
chat_offline_title: Friend is offline — message will be queued until a verified session is re-established
shortcuts_modal_close: Close any open dialog or modal
shortcuts_table_open: Open file / copy value / auto-size column
close_dialog_message: What would you like Ember to do? Minimizing keeps your downloads, uploads, and friend connections active in the background.
close_dialog_remember: Remember my choice (you can change this in Settings → General)
settings_language_description: Pick the language used throughout the app. Changing language reloads the window.
layout_settings_load_error: Could not load app settings. Please restart the app.
layout_settings_load_error_detail: Could not load app settings: {detail}. Please restart the app.
layout_init_failed: Failed to initialize. Please restart the app.
speed_input_unlimited_aria: Unlimited — activate to set a limit
browse_listener_failed: Could not listen for browse results. Try re-opening the dialog.
browse_error_notifications_unavailable: Browse error notifications unavailable; results may still arrive.
browse_request_timed_out: Browse request timed out. The friend may be offline.
wizard_welcome_desc: Ember is a modern P2P file sharing client built on the eMule network. It is fully compatible with all eMule-family clients (eMule, aMule, eMule Xtreme, etc.).
wizard_welcome_hint: Let's configure your preferences. You can change any of these later in Settings.
wizard_feature_dual_desc: KAD decentralized DHT + eD2K servers for maximum source discovery.
wizard_feature_epx_desc: Ember peers share source lists with each other for faster downloads. Non-Ember clients are unaffected.
wizard_feature_secure_desc: Protocol obfuscation, IP filtering, and credits-based upload priority.
wizard_nickname_desc: This is how you appear to other peers on the network. You can use the generated name or pick your own.
wizard_nickname_hint: Max 128 characters. Visible to peers you connect with.
wizard_folder_desc: Choose where Ember saves downloaded files. Completed files will appear in a "Downloads" subfolder which is automatically shared.
wizard_ports_desc: Ember needs a TCP port (file transfers) and a UDP port (KAD DHT). The defaults work for most users. If your VPN only forwards a single port number, you can set both fields to the same value — TCP and UDP are independent protocols. Enable UPnP to automatically forward ports on your router.
wizard_ports_hint: If UPnP is off, you may need to manually forward these ports on your router for best performance (HighID).
wizard_bandwidth_desc: Set upload and download speed limits to avoid saturating your connection. Leave unlimited if you have plenty of bandwidth.
wizard_speed_test_failed: Speed test failed. You can set limits manually.
wizard_connect_desc: Choose whether to automatically connect to the KAD network when Ember starts.
wizard_connect_kad_desc: Decentralized peer discovery via the Kademlia DHT. Recommended for most users.
wizard_connect_hint: You can enable additional network options like eD2K servers later in Settings.
wizard_ready_desc: Here's a summary of your configuration. You can change any of these later in Settings.
wizard_dl_ipfilter_skipped: — skipped, can be downloaded later in Security settings
stats_banned_ips_hint: IP addresses currently blocked, including manual bans and automatic bans for request flooding or sending corrupt data.
security_toggle_enabled_title: Enable or disable the IP filter
security_toggle_private_title: Block private and reserved IP ranges (10.x, 172.16.x, 192.168.x, etc.)
security_empty_no_ranges_sub: Download or import an ipfilter.dat to get started
security_both_ips_required: Both start and end IP are required
security_invalid_ip_format: Invalid IP address format. Use dotted decimal (e.g. 192.168.1.0)
friends_discoverable_suffix: — friends can find you on the network.
friends_firewall_body: Friends can find you but won't be able to connect directly. Enable port forwarding or UPnP in your router to fix this.
friends_request_verified_title: Peer's Ember identity is cryptographically consistent on the session this request arrived on.
friends_request_unverified_title: Peer did not complete identity verification on this session. Only accept if you know who this is.
friends_empty_sub: Share your Friend ID above so others can add you. Friends get priority upload slots — they jump to the front of your queue.
friends_validation_self_add: You cannot add yourself as a friend
friends_validation_already_friend: This user is already in your friend list
friends_confirm_remove_message: Remove {name} from your friend list? They will lose upload priority.
friends_search_firewalled: {name} is behind a firewall. They may need to enable port forwarding, or wait for them to find you.
friends_search_not_found: {name} could not be found on the network. Make sure they're online with Ember.
friends_search_timeout: {name} appears to be offline or unreachable.
servers_validation_port_range: Port must be a number between 1 and 65535
servers_validation_met_url: Please enter a valid server.met URL
servers_empty_no_servers_sub: Add a server using the form on the right, or download a server.met file
servers_empty_no_matches_sub: Try a different search term or clear the filter.
servers_not_connected: Not connected to any eD2K server
servers_confirm_remove_all_message: Remove all {count} servers from the list? This cannot be undone.
kad_bootstrap_title: Bootstrap KAD by IP, URL, or known contacts
kad_press_connect: Press Connect to join the KAD network
kad_empty_no_contacts_sub: Bootstrap to discover peers on the network
kad_type_lifecycle_help:
Contact lifecycle:
  Active — recently responsive
  Verified — IP verified by KAD challenge
  Expiring — nearing timeout, awaiting refresh
  New — added recently, not yet validated
  Dead — unresponsive, will be removed
  Bootstrap — seed node, not counted against routing table
kad_stat_kad_users_title: Estimated number of KAD users worldwide, derived from routing-table density
kad_stat_ember_peers_title: Ember-aware peers discovered in this session
kad_stat_epx_sources_title: Sources learned via EPX (Ember Peer Exchange)
kad_firewall_aria_firewalled: Firewall status: firewalled. Inbound TCP connections are blocked; KAD operates via UDP callbacks.
kad_firewall_aria_open: Firewall status: open. Inbound TCP connections succeed; full KAD participation is available.
kad_upnp_disabled_title: UPnP is disabled in Settings — click to open Settings
kad_bootstrap_hint_ip: Send a bootstrap request to a single KAD node. Use the node's public IP or hostname and its KAD (UDP) port.
kad_bootstrap_hint_url_suffix: file from a URL and bootstrap from its contents. URLs are validated against SSRF rules before fetch.
kad_bootstrap_hint_clients: Re-bootstrap by re-pinging KAD contacts currently in this session's routing table. Useful when the network looks idle but some verified peers are still cached from earlier activity. Won't help on a completely fresh start — use IP or URL bootstrap first.
kad_searches_empty_disconnected_sub: Connect to the KAD network to see active searches
kad_searches_empty_sub: Searches will appear here when initiated from the Search page
library_aich_available: AICH hash available — bad chunks can be identified without re-downloading the whole file
library_search_placeholder: Search files by name…  (press / to focus)
library_duplicates_tooltip: Show only files whose hash matches another file ({files} files across {hashes} hashes)
library_no_missing: No indexed files are missing from disk
library_missing_tooltip: Show only files whose path no longer exists on disk ({count})
library_remove_missing_tooltip: Remove all missing files from the shared index (does not touch disk)
library_copy_all_links_title: Copy all eD2K links to clipboard
library_coll_format_binary_desc: Standard eMule collection — preserves author and name
library_coll_format_text_desc: Plain list of eD2K links — works with any client or paste target
library_coll_no_hashed_files: No hashed files available. Add folders and wait for hashing to complete.
library_dnd_sub: Folders will be scanned and added to your library
library_unshare_folder_title: Unshare all files in this folder
library_top_session_title: Uploads since the app was last started
library_top_empty_session: No uploads yet this session. Activity resets each time Ember starts.
library_top_empty_alltime: No upload activity yet. Files you've shared will appear here once peers start downloading.
library_stop_confirm_text: Stopping will remove incompletely scanned folders from the Library. Continue?
library_empty_no_shared_sub: Add a folder to share files with the network
library_bulk_hidden_title: Bulk actions apply only to the {shown} file(s) currently visible. Click to clear filters and reveal all selected files.
library_bulk_copy_links_title: Copy eD2K links for selected files
library_bulk_new_collection_title: Create a collection from selected files
library_meta_peers_title: KAD peers that have acknowledged a source record or known complete copies
library_republish_title_online: Reset publish timers so this file is re-published to the KAD network on the next cycle
library_republish_title_offline: KAD is not connected — republish will be deferred until the network comes online
library_select_hashed_file: Select at least one hashed file to build a collection.
library_confirm_remove_missing_one:
Remove 1 missing file from your library?

This only affects Ember's index — no files on disk are touched.
library_confirm_remove_missing_other:
Remove {count} missing files from your library?

This only affects Ember's index — no files on disk are touched.
library_confirm_remove_folder_one:
Remove "{name}" from your shared folders?

1 file will be removed from the index. No files on disk are touched.
library_confirm_remove_folder_other:
Remove "{name}" from your shared folders?

{count} files will be removed from the index. No files on disk are touched.
library_confirm_remove_folder_empty:
Remove "{name}" from your shared folders?

No files on disk are touched.
library_confirm_delete_one:
Delete 1 file ({size}) from disk?

This cannot be undone.
library_confirm_delete_other:
Delete {count} files ({size}) from disk?

This cannot be undone.
library_confirm_delete_single:
Delete "{name}" from disk?

This cannot be undone.
library_copied_link_unshared_single: Copied link, but this file is not shared. Other peers won't find you as a source until you share it.
library_copied_ed2k_link_aich: Copied eD2K link with AICH hash
library_folder_priority_title: Default upload priority for this folder
library_kad_not_connected_republish: KAD is not connected — file will be republished once the network comes online.
library_confirm_unshare_folder_one:
Unshare 1 file in "{name}"?

Other peers will no longer be able to download this file from you. The folder itself stays in your library.
library_confirm_unshare_folder_other:
Unshare {count} files in "{name}"?

Other peers will no longer be able to download these files from you. The folder itself stays in your library.
search_spam_hidden_none: No spam results are currently hidden.
search_spam_help_prefix: A result is hidden when marked spam manually, or when its spam score is at least
search_filter_help_prefix: Tip: use space-separated terms, and prefix with
search_network_disconnected_hint: Network is disconnected. Connect KAD or a server in Peers for better search results.
search_network_degraded_hint: {reason}. Results may be limited until the network is fully ready.
search_empty_title: Search for files across the P2P network
search_empty_hint: Enter a query and press Enter or click Search — each search opens in its own tab
search_no_results_hint: Try another query or different keywords
search_hint_not_connected: Server is not connected. Connect a server in Peers to widen search results.
search_hint_server_empty_only: No server results yet. Try a different query or connect to another server.
search_hint_server_empty_mixed: KAD returned results but the server did not. Try waiting or switching server.
search_hint_server_empty_global: No matches yet. Try a different query.
search_failed_unmark_spam: Failed to mark as not spam
search_double_click_hint: Double-click a row to download. Right-click for more options. Shift+click checkboxes to select a range.
search_history_in_library_title: This file is in your library
search_remove_from_history_title: Forget this file's download history entry so it stops being labelled as {status}
search_no_notes: No notes found for this file
search_no_results_filters: No results match the current filters
transfers_paste_link_title: Read an ed2k:// link from the clipboard and start downloading
transfers_priority_tooltip_high: High: downloaded before normal and low priority files
transfers_priority_tooltip_low: Low: downloaded after high and normal priority files
transfers_priority_tooltip_verylow: Very Low: downloaded only when no higher priority files are waiting
transfers_priority_tooltip_auto: Auto: priority adjusted automatically based on file size and availability
transfers_priority_tooltip_release: Release: highest priority, downloaded before all other files
transfers_dl_tooltip_searching_base: Searching for sources on the network
transfers_dl_tooltip_queued_no_sources: No sources found yet, searching the network
transfers_dl_tooltip_queued_base: Waiting in a remote client's upload queue
transfers_dl_tooltip_queued_reason: Waiting in a remote client's upload queue. {reason}
transfers_dl_tooltip_insufficient: Insufficient disk space to continue download
transfers_dl_tooltip_noneneeded: No sources have parts needed to complete the file
transfers_ul_tooltip_active: Actively uploading data to this client
transfers_clipboard_too_long: Clipboard text is too long ({length} chars, max {max}) — eD2K links are typically under 1 KiB
transfers_clipboard_not_ed2k: Clipboard does not contain an ed2k:// link
transfers_no_user_hash: No user hash available for this peer
transfers_overview_dl_title: Active download payload rate (status bar shows total network rate)
transfers_overview_ul_title: Active upload payload rate (status bar shows total network rate)
transfers_toggle_cols_title: Toggle between full and compact columns
transfers_empty_start_search_suffix: to find files on the network.
transfers_batch_cancel_title: Cancel and remove all selected downloads
transfers_selection_hint: Click to select · Shift+click for range · Ctrl/Cmd+click to toggle · Double-click for sources
transfers_tab_queued_title: Peers waiting in our upload queue
transfers_tab_known_title: Every peer with a SecIdent credit record (lifetime)
transfers_empty_no_uploads_sub: Shared files will appear here when peers request them.
transfers_queue_transfer_history_title: We've uploaded {up} to and downloaded {down} from this peer
transfers_known_filter_placeholder: Filter by hash, IP, country, or friend nickname
transfers_known_friends_title: Peers in this list that you have added as friends
transfers_known_total_up_title: Lifetime bytes uploaded to all known peers (drives our credit on their side)
transfers_known_total_down_title: Lifetime bytes downloaded from all known peers
transfers_known_uploaded_title: Lifetime bytes we've uploaded to this peer
transfers_known_downloaded_title: Lifetime bytes we've downloaded from this peer
transfers_known_no_pubkey_title: No public key cached — credit floor at 1.0
transfers_known_credit_title: Credit ratio (1.0 = baseline, higher means we owe upload to them)
transfers_known_rep_title_banned: score={score}, successful={successful}, failed={failed} (currently banned by the tracker)
transfers_known_rep_no_record: No reputation record yet — the tracker has not observed this peer on an active session.
transfers_empty_no_credit_sub: Records appear after peers verify their identity with us.
transfers_empty_all_sources_failed_sub: Sources will reappear once the download contacts a peer.
transfers_empty_multiple_selected_sub: Select a single download above to view its source clients.
transfers_empty_no_active_dl_sub: Source clients will appear here once a download is running.
transfers_empty_select_dl_sub: Click a download above to see its source clients.
transfers_confirm_cancel_message: Cancel download of "{name}"? The partial file will be deleted.
transfers_confirm_clear_completed_msg: Remove all completed transfers from the list?
transfers_confirm_recover_message: Rebuild a salvage copy of "{name}" from the downloaded parts? This can take a minute or two for large files. The original .part file is not modified.
transfers_confirm_batch_cancel_one: Cancel 1 download and delete partial data?
transfers_confirm_batch_cancel_other: Cancel {count} downloads and delete partial data?
settings_close_behavior_hint: Choose what happens when you click the title-bar X. The system tray icon stays available either way so you can reopen Ember from there.
settings_close_behavior_ask_desc: Show a dialog with both options
settings_close_behavior_exit_desc: Quit the app fully each time
settings_max_file_size_hint: Reject downloads larger than this (default 4096 GiB)
settings_add_paused_hint: New downloads start paused until manually resumed.
settings_auto_remove_hint: Automatically remove finished downloads from the transfer list.
settings_skip_compress_video_hint: Don't compress AVI/MKV/MP4 during uploads (already compressed).
settings_download_history_hint: Ember remembers previously downloaded and cancelled files and shows them in search results, so you can avoid re-downloading the same content.
settings_spam_filter_hint: Score search results against known spam patterns (eMule-compatible).
settings_spam_profile_hint: Relaxed shows only high-confidence spam. Balanced is recommended for most users. Aggressive hides more suspicious results.
settings_spam_db_hint: Local training data used by the spam filter.
settings_search_timeout_hint: How long to wait for global search, source lookup, and file notes (30–600).
settings_filename_cleanups_hint_prefix: Pipe-separated substrings stripped from filenames in search and library views (e.g.
settings_uss_hint: Automatically adjusts upload speed based on network latency to prevent congestion. Requires an upload speed limit to be set.
settings_speed_test_hint: Measures your connection speed and calculates recommended limits. Upload is set to 80% of measured speed to keep your connection stable.
settings_udp_port_hint: KAD DHT (default 4672). May match the TCP port if your VPN only forwards a single port.
settings_upnp_hint: Auto-configure router ports. Disable for manual forwarding.
settings_auto_connect_kad_hint: Automatically bootstrap KAD on startup. When off, press Connect to start.
settings_nodes_hint: Fetch the latest KAD bootstrap nodes from emule-security.org. Useful if KAD can't connect.
settings_auto_connect_server_hint: Automatically connect to an eD2K server on startup.
settings_update_servers_hint: Ask each eD2K server you connect to for its known peer servers and merge them into your list.
settings_update_servers_aria: Update server list when connecting to a server
settings_update_servers_clients_hint: Accept new servers advertised by other eD2K clients during peer connections. Off if you prefer a curated list.
settings_filter_servers_hint: Apply your IP filter to newly discovered servers as well as peers.
settings_obfuscation_hint: Encrypt KAD UDP traffic with RC4. Compatible with eMule.
settings_ip_filter_hint: Block known-bad IP ranges via ipfilter.dat
settings_filter_incoming_hint: Apply IP filter to incoming peer connections. VPN users may need to disable this since VPN IPs often appear in filter lists.
settings_block_private_hint: Reject 10.x, 192.168.x, etc. from the routing table.
settings_antileech_hint: Reject incoming peer connections from known leech clients.
settings_antileech_errors_title: Patterns rejected by the regex compiler:
settings_friend_require_approval_hint: Always show incoming friend requests on the Friends page for explicit accept. When off, requests from peers you already added as a friend auto-confirm. Requests carry a Verified badge when the peer's Ember identity is cryptographically consistent — proof-of-possession on friend-connect dial-back sessions, identity-binding check on regular file-transfer sessions. Even with a Verified badge, only accept requests from people you recognise.
settings_friend_online_notif_hint: Show a toast when a friend comes online.
settings_friend_chat_disabled_hint: Ignore incoming chat messages from friends. You won't be able to send messages either.
settings_friend_browse_disabled_hint: Don't respond to browse-shares requests from friends. Your shared file list stays private.
settings_friend_session_encryption_hint: Wrap friend connections with RC4 obfuscation to prevent casual packet inspection.
settings_max_friends_hint: Limit the total number of friends you can add (1–500, default 200).
settings_restart_dialog_title: Restart Ember to apply port change?
settings_restart_dialog_message: You changed your {reason}. Ember binds the listening sockets when the app starts, so the new port(s) won't take effect until the app is restarted. Restart now?
settings_spam_reset_dialog_message: Clear all learned spam filter data — hashes, filenames, and source IPs. The filter will start from scratch and re-learn from your actions. This cannot be undone.
settings_restart_failed: Restart failed: {error}. Please close and reopen Ember manually for the new ports to take effect.
settings_restart_deferred: Settings saved. The new port(s) will take effect the next time you launch Ember.
settings_revert_failed: Could not revert in-memory snapshot; reloading from disk
settings_spam_reset_failed: Failed to reset spam filter data
error_self_add: You can't add yourself as a friend
error_collections_file_outside_allowed_d: Collection file must be inside a shared or download folder
error_collections_invalid_file_extension: File must be a .emulecollection or .txt file
error_collections_no_folders_configured: No shared or download folders configured
error_collections_output_invalid_extensi: Output file must have .emulecollection or .txt extension
error_collections_output_outside_allowed: Output path must be inside a shared or download folder
error_collections_output_path_no_parent_: Output path must not contain '..' components
error_comments_comment_too_long: Comment too long (max 4096 bytes, matching eMule limit)
error_comments_invalid_file_hash: Invalid file hash: expected 32 hex characters
error_peers_cannot_add_self: You cannot add yourself as a friend
error_peers_friend_limit_reached: Friend limit reached ({detail}). Increase the limit in Settings > Friends.
error_peers_hostname_resolves_private: Hostname resolves to a private/loopback address
error_peers_message_size_invalid: Message must be between 1 and 4096 bytes
error_peers_pubkey_wrong_length: Public key must decode to 32 bytes, got {detail}
error_peers_user_hash_invalid: User hash must be 32 hex characters (16 bytes)
error_search_empty_note: Add a rating or a comment before publishing
error_search_file_name_invalid: File name is empty or too long
error_search_link_firewalled: Cannot add sources to link while firewalled (LowID)
error_search_link_no_source: No reachable public address available for a source link
error_search_invalid_file_hash_hex: Invalid file hash: expected 32 hex characters
error_search_network_busy_retry: Network is busy, please try again
error_search_no_kad_contacts: No Kad contacts available to publish note
error_search_history_batch_too_large: Too many hashes in one batch (max {detail}) — chunk the request
error_search_query_too_long: Search query exceeds {detail} bytes; shorten it
error_security_archive_no_usable_ipfilte: Archive does not contain a usable ipfilter.dat/.dat/.txt/.p2p file
error_security_failed_to_read_selected_a: Failed to read selected archive entry: {detail}
error_security_failed_to_receive_ip_filt: Failed to receive IP filter stats: {detail}
error_security_invalid_ipfilter_file_typ: IP filter file must be a .dat, .txt, .gz, .zip, or .p2p file
error_security_start_ip_must_be_less_tha: Start IP must be less than or equal to end IP
error_server_no_ipv4: No IPv4 address found for the given hostname
error_server_resolves_private: Server hostname resolves to a private/loopback address
error_settings_download_folder_parent_di: Download folder must not contain '..' path components
error_settings_download_folder_system_di: Cannot use system directory as download folder: {detail}
error_settings_download_part_retry_round: Part hash retry rounds must be between 1 and 20
error_settings_download_queue_wait_inval: Download queue wait must be between 60 and 14400 seconds
error_settings_max_concurrent_downloads_: Max concurrent downloads must be between 1 and 50
error_settings_max_concurrent_uploads_in: Max concurrent uploads must be between 1 and 50
error_settings_max_connections_invalid: Max connections must be between 1 and 2000
error_settings_max_download_file_size_in: Max download file size must be between 1 and 16384 GiB
error_settings_max_friends_invalid: Max friends must be between 1 and 500
error_settings_max_sources_per_file_inva: Max sources per file must be between 1 and 2000
error_settings_multisource_retry_rounds_: Multi-source retry rounds must be between 1 and 20
error_settings_nickname_too_long: Nickname must be 128 bytes or fewer
error_settings_rendezvous_url_has_creden: Rendezvous URL must not contain credentials
error_settings_rendezvous_url_no_host: Rendezvous URL must have a valid host
error_settings_search_timeout_invalid: Search timeout must be between 30 and 600 seconds
error_settings_shared_folder_parent_dir: Shared folder must not contain '..' path components: {detail}
error_settings_spam_filter_profile_inval: Spam filter profile must be 'relaxed', 'balanced', or 'aggressive'
error_settings_tcp_port_invalid: TCP port must be between 1 and 65535
error_settings_udp_port_invalid: UDP port must be between 1 and 65535
error_sharing_dangerous_file: Cannot open potentially dangerous file types
error_sharing_file_not_in_index: File not found in shared index
error_sharing_file_not_in_shared: File is not within a shared or download folder
error_sharing_folder_not_in_shared: Folder is not within a shared or download directory
error_sharing_folder_not_shared: Folder is not a shared folder
error_sharing_file_not_shared: File is not in a shared folder
error_sharing_batch_too_large: Too many files in a single request (max {detail})
error_sharing_path_not_dir: Path does not exist or is not a directory
error_transfers_batch_too_large: Too many transfers in a single request ({detail})
error_transfers_dangerous_file_type: Cannot open potentially dangerous file types. Please use a dedicated application.
error_transfers_no_parts_for_recovery: No completed parts available for recovery
error_transfers_not_supported_archive: File is not a supported archive format (ZIP, RAR, ACE)
error_transfers_part_file_not_found: Part file not found — download may not have started
